title: Senator Shannon Grove ( R-Bakersfield ) is pleased to announce her legislation, Senate Bill 1043 , the Accountability in Children’s Treatment Act , has been signed into law by Gove

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California’s short-term residential therapeutic programs (STRTPs) serve children and young adults who need an increased level of care.",
    "Treatment facilities have the ability to use restraints and seclusion rooms if the facility believes the patient is a danger to themselves or others.",
    "These facilities are required to report all restraint and seclusion room use to the California Department of Social Services (CDSS).",
    "The California Department of Social Services is required to publicly post information about restraint and seclusion room use.",
    "SB 1043 will require CDSS to publicly post critical data, including each incident report related to restraints and seclusion rooms.",
    "The Accountability in Children’s Treatment Act strengthens accountability measures within California’s STRTPs."
  ]
}
```
